name: Hyper Wave Trial
description: Control the Wave, avoid obstacles, collect coins, and reach the end of each level! Every level features dangerous obstacles that require precision and dexterity, while portals keep the gameplay engaging. If a level feels too difficult, practice mode lets you hone your skills and improve your reaction time. Game Features: • 3 worlds with different locations • 30 levels ranging from easy to highly challenging • 49 skins to unlock • Portals that add variety to gameplay • Practice mode to improve your skills • Ability to customize the • Colorful neon environment • Rhythmic music • Simple one-finger controls
instructions: Desktop bull Hold the left mouse button space fly up bull Release fly down bull Q add a checkpoint in practice mode bull E delete the last checkpoint in practice mode bull ESC P TAB pause Mobile bull Hold your finger fly up a
